channel.title: 0ziyuan
channel.description: Don't try to understand it, feel it.

item.title: Hello World
item.description: Welcome to 0ziyuan’s blog! This is my very first post. Click about for more info. If you get any problems when visiting my blog, you can contact me through my email. I’d be delighted if you fork me on GitHub​.😄
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to 0ziyuan’s blog! This is my very first post. Click about for more info. If you get any problems when visiting my blog, you can contact me through my email. I’d be delighted if you fork me on GitHub​.😄

Why I build this blog site

  1. 记录学习；
  2. 分享交流；
  3. Just for fun..😂

How I build this blog site

鉴于还是一个技术力和财力皆无的学生党，我是参照教程用Hexo生成静态页面，然后将代码托管到GitHub Pages上的方式创建网站的。博客主题为 Next下的Muse,文章编辑工具用的是Typora。主要参照教程如下，感兴趣的小伙伴可以康康：

  • 从零开始搭建个人博客（超详细）

  • 网站ICP备案和公安备案流程

  • 【官方支持】让个人域名下Github Pages完美支持https

    注：教程有些bug，也可能与实际操作存在出入，不过应该都能百度解决，毕竟我就是这么干的😅(外加查看相关代码的说明文档)

In the end

Don’t try to understand it, feel it.
